Albaik
Our Story | Global Reach | Signature Flavors

Crispy taste loved since 1974

From a modest restaurant in Jeddah to more than 150 locations, Albaik’s passion for quality and value hasn’t changed.

How It All Began

Entrepreneur Shakour Abu Ghazalah opened Saudi Arabia’s first pressure‑fried chicken restaurant on Old Airport Road in Jeddah back in 1974. The brand was officially registered as Albaik a decade later and quickly became a pilgrimage favorite during Hajj. Today, the red‑and‑white stores are a staple across the Gulf.
(Sources: Wikipedia)

1974

First restaurant opens in Jeddah, introducing pressure‑fried chicken to the Kingdom.

1990

Expands to Mecca, serving millions of pilgrims every year.

2002

Launch of Albaik Express – a limited‑menu concept for malls & highways.

2015 – 2021

Rapid growth beyond the Hejaz region and first international outlets in Bahrain, UAE & Kuwait.

Today

150+ restaurants, 12k+ team members and a reputation for unbeatable value.

Our Global Footprint

Albaik proudly serves guests across Saudi Arabia and the wider Middle East – with new markets on the horizon.

Signature Flavors

Golden broasted chicken, zesty garlic sauce and crunchy fries are just the beginning. Here’s a (very) small taste…
